about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Preserving Latvian Heritage Through Fashion
about.intro: GERBONI was born from a deep love for Latvian culture and a desire to share its rich heraldic traditions with the world.
about.missionText: We believe that every Latvian city has a unique story to tell, beautifully captured in its coat of arms. Our mission is to bring these symbols of local pride and history to life through high-quality, wearable art.
about.qualityText: Each GERBONI t-shirt is crafted from 100% organic cotton, ethically sourced and printed using eco-friendly techniques. We partner with local artisans to ensure every design meets the highest standards of heraldic accuracy.
about.heritageText: From Riga's iconic crossed keys to Liepāja's majestic lion, each coat of arms represents centuries of history, culture, and community pride. When you wear GERBONI, you're not just wearing a t-shirt – you're carrying a piece of Latvian heritage.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Help Center
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our products, shipping, returns, and more.
faq.stillHaveQuestionsDescription: Can't find what you're looking for? Our support team is ready to help.

ordersShipping.title: Orders & Shipping
ordersShipping.a1: Latvia: 2-4 business days (€3.99, free over €50). EU countries: 5-10 business days (€7.99, free over €75). Express shipping available for Latvia only at +€12 (1-2 days).
ordersShipping.a2: Yes! We ship to the UK (7-14 days, €12.99), USA/Canada (10-21 days, €19.99), and other countries on request. Contact international@gerboni.lv for quotes. Note: customs fees and import duties may apply.
ordersShipping.q3: How can I track my order?
ordersShipping.a3: Once your order ships, you'll receive an email with a tracking number. You can also view your order status in your account under 'Orders'. All orders ship from Rīga with tracking.
ordersShipping.q4: Can I change my shipping address after ordering?
ordersShipping.a4: Yes, as long as the order hasn't shipped yet. Contact support immediately at support@gerboni.lv or use our live chat. After shipping, address changes are not possible.
ordersShipping.a5: Orders can be cancelled within 1 hour of placing them. After that, we may have already started processing. Contact support immediately if you need to cancel.

returnsRefunds.title: Returns & Refunds
returnsRefunds.a1: We offer a 14-day return window from delivery date. Items must be unworn with original tags attached. Return shipping is free within Latvia; EU customers pay return postage.
returnsRefunds.q2: How do I return an item?
returnsRefunds.a2: Contact support@gerboni.lv or use our live chat within 14 days of delivery. We'll provide return instructions and a shipping label (free for Latvia).
returnsRefunds.a3: Refunds are processed within 5-10 business days of receiving the returned item. The refund goes to your original payment method. Bank processing may add 3-5 additional days.
returnsRefunds.q4: What if I received a damaged or wrong item?
returnsRefunds.a4: Report within 48 hours with photos. We'll send a replacement immediately or provide a full refund—your choice. No need to return the damaged item.
returnsRefunds.q5: Can I exchange for a different size or color?
returnsRefunds.a5: Yes, subject to stock availability. Contact us before returning to confirm the exchange item is in stock. Price differences will be charged or refunded.

productsSizing.title: Products & Sizing
productsSizing.a1: We offer XS through XXL. Check our size guide on each product page for detailed measurements. Our shirts are pre-shrunk, so what you see is what you get.
productsSizing.q2: What material are the t-shirts made of?
productsSizing.a2: 100% organic cotton, 180 GSM medium weight. Soft, breathable, and durable for everyday wear.
productsSizing.q3: How should I wash my t-shirt?
productsSizing.a3: Machine wash cold (30°C max), do not bleach, tumble dry low or hang dry. Iron on reverse side only to protect the print. Do not dry clean.
productsSizing.q4: Are the coat of arms designs authentic?
productsSizing.a4: Yes! Each design faithfully represents the official coat of arms of its respective Latvian city. Our designs are created in accordance with Latvian heraldic regulations.
productsSizing.q5: What printing method do you use?
productsSizing.a5: Direct-to-garment (DTG) printing with eco-friendly, wash-resistant inks. The print becomes part of the fabric for long-lasting quality.

paymentSecurity.title: Payment & Security
paymentSecurity.q1: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentSecurity.a1: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Klarna (buy now, pay later—EU only). All payments are secured via Stripe.
paymentSecurity.a2: Absolutely. We never store your card details. All payment processing is handled by Stripe with bank-level encryption and security.
paymentSecurity.q3: Do you offer buy now, pay later?
paymentSecurity.a3: Yes, Klarna is available for EU customers. Select Klarna at checkout to split your payment or pay within 30 days.
paymentSecurity.q4: Can I use multiple discount codes?
paymentSecurity.a4: Only one discount code can be applied per order. Choose the one that gives you the best value!

accountSupport.title: Account & Support
accountSupport.q1: Do I need an account to order?
accountSupport.a1: No! Guest checkout is always available. However, creating an account lets you track orders, save addresses, and view order history.
accountSupport.q2: How do I reset my password?
accountSupport.a2: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and enter your email. You'll receive a reset link within a few minutes.
accountSupport.q3: How can I delete my account?
accountSupport.a3: Email support@gerboni.lv with your deletion request. We'll process it within 30 days in compliance with GDPR.
accountSupport.a4: Live chat: 9:00-18:00 EET weekdays. Email: 24-hour response time. Phone: 10:00-17:00 EET weekdays. Chat gets the fastest response!

bulkCustom.title: Bulk & Custom Orders
bulkCustom.a1: Yes! 10+ items: 10% discount (auto-applied). 25+ items: 15% discount—contact sales@gerboni.lv for a custom quote.
bulkCustom.q2: Can I order custom municipality designs?
bulkCustom.a2: Yes! Minimum 50 units with a 4-6 week lead time. Email custom@gerboni.lv with your requirements for a quote.
bulkCustom.a3: Yes! Gift wrapping is available for €2.50 per item. You can also add a free personalized message (up to 150 characters) at checkout.

shipping.label: Information
shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.description: All orders ship from Rīga, Latvia with tracking provided via email. We offer flexible shipping options to suit your needs.
shipping.internationalDescription: We ship worldwide. For destinations outside the EU, please note that customs duties and import taxes may apply upon arrival.

processing.title: Order Processing
processing.text1: Orders placed before 2:00 PM EET on business days are typically processed and shipped within 24 hours. Orders placed after this time or on weekends will be processed on the next business day.
processing.text2: You'll receive a shipping confirmation email with your tracking number once your order has been dispatched.

notes.title: Important Notes
notes.item1: Delivery times are estimates and may vary during peak seasons
notes.item2: Tracking information updates may take 24-48 hours after shipment
notes.item3: We are not responsible for delays caused by customs or carrier issues
notes.item4: Contact us if your order hasn't arrived within the expected timeframe

returns.label: Policy
returns.title: Returns & Refunds
returns.description: We want you to love your GERBONI purchase. If you're not completely satisfied, we're here to help.

policy.title: Return Policy
policy.condition1: Items must be unworn with original tags attached
policy.condition2: Exchanges available for size/color (subject to stock)

damaged.title: Damaged or Defective Items
damaged.description: If you receive a damaged or defective item, we'll make it right immediately.
damaged.item1: Report within 48 hours of delivery with photos
damaged.item2: Full replacement or refund offered (your choice)
damaged.item3: No return shipping needed — keep or dispose of item
damaged.item4: Wrong item sent: free replacement shipped immediately

howTo.title: How to Return
howTo.description: Follow these simple steps to process your return

step1.title: Contact Support
step1.description: Email support@gerboni.lv or use our live chat within 14 days of delivery

step2.title: Get Return Label
step2.description: We'll send you a return label (free within Latvia, paid for EU)

step3.title: Ship Your Item
step3.description: Pack the item securely with original tags attached

step4.title: Receive Refund
step4.description: Refund processed within 5-10 business days of receiving the item

refunds.title: Refund Information
refunds.description: Once we receive your returned item, our team will inspect it and process your refund within 5-10 business days.
refunds.item1: Refunds are issued to the original payment method
refunds.item2: Original shipping costs are non-refundable (unless item was defective)
refunds.item3: Bank processing may take additional 3-5 business days

exchanges.title: Exchanges
exchanges.text: Want a different size or color? We offer exchanges subject to stock availability.
exchanges.item1: Contact us before shipping to confirm availability
exchanges.item2: Replacement shipped upon receipt of returned item
exchanges.item3: Price differences will be charged or refunded accordingly

sendMessage.title: Send Us a Message
